description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded shell with a matte gray finish and a minimalist, modern design. The front has a large, open face area with a pronounced brow and two rectangular indents above the opening, giving it a futuristic appearance. The top and sides are largely unadorned except for subtle raised details and a small rectangular feature on the upper rear, possibly for mounting or adjustment. The lower front section has a series of small, evenly spaced perforations, likely for ventilation or communication. The overall shape is aerodynamic and contoured to fit closely around the head, with no visible external straps or fasteners. The helmet appears robust and is likely constructed from a hard, impact-resistant material.
description: A matte gray, modern helmet with a smooth, rounded shell, open face area, and subtle raised details. It features a minimalist design with small front perforations and no visible graphics or straps.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large open face area, pronounced brow, and two rectangular indents above the opening, as well as small perforations on the lower front.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlights the smooth, rounded top and sides, with a small rectangular feature on the upper rear and subtle raised details.
description_view_2: Back view displays the helmet's broad, unadorned surface with two small raised bumps and a rectangular detail near the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Opposite rear angled view mirrors view 1, showing the same rectangular rear feature and overall smooth, contoured shape.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A single row of small, evenly spaced perforations on the lower front section; no other visible vents.
